The '''Heavy Single Trooper Aerial Platform''', also called the '''Heavy STAP''', was developed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Characteristics==
Sporting larger [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and a missile launcher than the [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAP-1]], the Heavy STAP was used to scout dangerous enemy territory and to eliminate retreating enemy forces.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This model closely resembles the STAP-1 and should not be confused with the [[STAP-2]] from ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'', which is also called a Heavy STAP.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
